## SK Hynix lists on Nasdaq July 10; leveraged (SKUU) and inverse (SKDD) ETFs expected to launch July 13

The US listing and immediate launch of leveraged and inverse products will broaden the investable universe for the HBM supply leader and likely amplify near-term price volatility around both launch dates.

- SK Hynix is scheduled to begin trading on Nasdaq on July 10.
- Leveraged ETF SKUU and inverse ETF SKDD tied to SK Hynix are expected to launch July 13.
- The announcement is a capital markets structure event, not an operational or earnings development.
- No pricing, deal size, or float details are specified in the headline.
